questions.question: An operating system uses a resource allocation graph (RAG) to manage resources. If two processes P1 and P2 are waiting for each other to release resources, what is the likely outcome in this scenario?
questions.hint: Explain the deadlock scenario and its consequences

questions.question: A deadlock has occurred in a system. What is the primary approach to recover from a deadlock?
questions.hint: Explain the primary recovery approach and its working

questions.question: A resource allocation graph (RAG) has been redrawn to resolve a deadlock scenario. If process P1 is allocated resources at the cost of process P2, what is the primary benefit of this allocation?
questions.hint: Explain the primary benefit of this allocation
